# DoneOps

> Your Ops, Done. We design, build, secure, and maintain infrastructure so your devs don't have to.

Last updated: 2026-04-02

DoneOps is a DevOps consulting firm founded by seasoned DevOps professionals. We work in your cloud accounts and tools with no vendor lock-in, providing 24-hour coverage with a globally distributed team. All work is backed by code in your repositories.

- Founded by experienced DevOps engineers
- No vendor lock-in -- we work in your accounts
- Globally distributed team for 24/7 coverage
- Security built in from the beginning (DevSecOps)
- Expertise in Kubernetes, Terraform, GitOps, CI/CD

## Services

- Cloud Infrastructure Design & Management (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- Kubernetes Cluster Management & Orchestration
- CI/CD Pipeline Design & Implementation
- GitOps with Flux CD and Argo CD
- Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
- DevSecOps & Security Compliance (SOC, ISO)
- Cloud Migrations (on-prem to cloud, multi-cloud)
- Service Mesh Implementation (Istio, Linkerd)
- Container Build & Runtime (Docker, containerd, Kaniko)
- Observability & Monitoring (Jaeger, Kiali, Fluentd)

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://doneops.com/) -- Company overview, services, and contact form
- [Blog](https://doneops.com/blog/) -- DevOps, DevSecOps, and cloud infrastructure insights
- [Case Studies](https://doneops.com/case-studies/) -- Real-world client engagements and outcomes
- [Cloud Migration Case Study](https://doneops.com/case-studies/cloudmigration/) -- GCP migration for supply chain firm
- [Infrastructure Case Study](https://doneops.com/case-studies/infrastructure/) -- Standardized hosting for online learning
- [Security Case Study](https://doneops.com/case-studies/security/) -- Auth and identity management implementation
- [Flux Graduation](https://doneops.com/blog/flux-graduation/) -- Flux CD CNCF incubator graduation

## Technical Focus Areas

- Kubernetes, Helm, Flux CD, Argo CD, Knative
- Terraform, Infrastructure as Code
- CI/CD (Jenkins, Spinnaker, Cloud Build, Skaffold)
- Cloud Platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure)
- Service Mesh (Istio, Linkerd, Envoy)
- Container Security, DevSecOps
- GitOps, ChatOps
- Observability (Jaeger, Kiali, Fluentd)
